name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Original Leather】🧏🏻‍♀️ Black with Silver Hardware
Loulou Puffer mini_ Mini size #23CM Crossbody is here! The whole bag is made of soft Italian lambskin, featuring YSL's diagonal quilted craftsmanship. It has a soft front flap pocket, a detachable shoulder strap, and a buckle that allows it to be used as a storage bag or an underarm bag. Easily achieve multi-purpose use with one bag!
Size: 23×15.5×8.5cm
Model: 620333
